basic_details.job_title: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Officer, Pharmacist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) has published the Medical Officer, Pharmacist, and House Keeper Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill 4 vacancies under the ECHS Recruitment 2026. Candidates holding an MBBS degree, a Diploma in Pharmacy or 10+2 with Science and pharmacist registration, or possessing the required literacy and relevant work experience as prescribed for the respective posts are eligible to apply through Offline mode on or before 20 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application form are provided below.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with Minimum 03 years work experience, Pharmacy from a recognized institute or 10+2 with Science stream and Approved Diploma in Pharmacy, registered as Pharmacist, Minimum 03 years work experience, Literate, Minimum 5 years work experience
qualification.details: Medical Officer: MBBS, Minimum 03 years work experience Pharmacist: (i) Pharmacy from a recognized institute or (ii) 10+2 with Science stream (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) from a recognized Board and Approved Diploma in Pharmacy from an institute recognized by the pharmacy Council of India and registered as Pharmacist under the Pharmacy Act 1948. Minimum 03 years work experience House Keeper: Literate, Minimum 5 years work experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.ex_servicemen_contributory_health_scheme: MBBS with Minimum 03 years work experience, Pharmacy from a recognized institute or 10+2 with Science stream and Approved Diploma in Pharmacy, registered as Pharmacist, Minimum 03 years work experience, Literate, Minimum 5 years work experience

content_sections.heading: ECHS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ECHS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ECHS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Medical Officer: MBBS, Minimum 03 years work experience Pharmacist: (i) Pharmacy from a recognized institute or (ii) 10+2 with Science stream (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) from a recognized Board and Approved Diploma in Pharmacy from an institute recognized by the pharmacy Council of India and registered as Pharmacist under the Pharmacy Act 1948. Minimum 03 years work experience House Keeper: Literate, Minimum 5 years work experience

rows.event: Last Date of Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Medical Officer, Pharmacist, House Keeper Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of applications for the ECHS recruitment is 20 July 2026. Candidates must ensure their application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for Medical Officer, Pharmacist, and House Keeper posts under the ECHS Recruitment 2026. These positions are contractual.

faq.question: Q3. What are the posts available in ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The posts available in the ECHS Recruitment 2026 are Medical Officer, Pharmacist, and House Keeper. There are 3 Medical Officer, 1 Pharmacist, and 1 House Keeper positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the specified address.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Medical Officer in ECHS?
faq.answer: The salary for a Medical Officer in ECHS is Rs. 95,000/- per month. This is a contractual position under the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme.

faq.question: Q6. What is the qualification required for a Pharmacist post in ECHS?
faq.answer: For a Pharmacist, candidates need a Pharmacy diploma or 10+2 with Science and an approved Diploma in Pharmacy, registered as a Pharmacist, with minimum 3 years work experience.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ECHS Medical Officer, Pharmacist, House Keeper Recruitment 2026. The fee is Nil.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for ECHS Various Posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for ECHS Various Posts includes an Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates will be assessed based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the ECHS posts be located?
faq.answer: The ECHS posts are located in Palampur, Himachal Pradesh. These positions are part of the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme operations in the specified city.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for ECHS Recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) recruitment and related information is www.echs.gov.in. Candidates can find the application form and notification there.
